name: Pocket Tone
explanation: A lo-fi mini-digital pocket synth with a charming toy-instrument character. Six voices play one of five selectable single-cycle timbres (piano, fantasy, violin, flute, guitar), each built from a short additive or pulse formula, through a simple AR amplitude contour with a touch of pitch vibrato. A BITS control adds the unmistakable cheap-digital crunch via combined bit-depth and sample-rate reduction. Controls: Voice, Attack, Release, Vibrato, Bits and Level.
